mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sale_request ( request_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, type, reason, status, refund_amount ) VALUES ( #{requestNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{refundAmount} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, type, reason, status, refund_amount, handler_note, handled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM after_sale_request WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ('REQUESTED', 'APPROVED') ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, request_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, type, reason, status, refund_amount, handler_note, handled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM after_sale_request WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, request_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, type, reason, status, refund_amount, handler_note, handled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM after_sale_request WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND request_no = #{requestNo} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE after_sale_request SET status = #{status}, handler_note = #{handlerNote}, handled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
